answers.where: Hangar on the stylized studs floor with the Assault Walker, Sentinel display, and reused CC0 Kenney sci-fi station props framing the scene.
answers.action: Inspect the hangar/showroom and press Battle.
answers.response: The sourced station props now read more like a plastic sci-fi hangar instead of isolated flat-tinted pieces.
answers.reward: The first screen gains more Roblox-like toy-world framing while keeping the mech and Battle button readable.
answers.game_look: Sourced mechs, repeated CC0 station props, glossy plastic shader lighting, studs floor, readable font HUD, and clear Battle action make the screen read closer to a casual Roblox-like mech showroom.

issues.text: Kenney station props now use a dedicated plastic shader and stronger sourced-prop framing, but true material masks/section colors are still needed for richer toy-station detail.
